CustomField.description: Predicted segmentation tier for the lead (Strategic, Enterprise, Commercial, SMB, Partner Managed). Same Northstar_Customer_Segment GVS as Account.Customer_Segment__c so segment carries through on Lead conversion.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Tier the lead is being qualified into. Drives SDR routing and the deal-desk threshold once converted.
CustomField.label: Customer Segment
